summary: A clip from a local breaking-news segment. It opens on nighttime footage of a street with emergency vehicles and flashing lights, captioned 4-YEAR-OLD HIT BY VEHICLE, VICTIM IN CRITICAL CONDITION, DRIVER FOUND & ARRESTED. After a brief transition it shows a booking-style photo of a man with dark hair, labeled with a name, under the banner HIT-AND-RUN DRIVER ARRESTED, 4-YEAR-OLD HIT IN FRESNO.

script.scene: Nighttime street footage with emergency vehicles; caption reads 4-YEAR-OLD HIT BY VEHICLE, DRIVER FOUND & ARRESTED.
A blank graphic transition with a BREAKING NEWS UPDATE banner.
A booking-style photo of a man appears under the banner HIT-AND-RUN DRIVER ARRESTED, 4-YEAR-OLD HIT IN FRESNO.
